title: Ethipothala Falls
tagline: Ethipothala Falls — heritage city of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Ethipothala Falls is a 70 feet (21 m) high river cascade situated in Palnadu district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Ethipothala Falls is a 70 feet (21 m) high river cascade situated in Palnadu district, Andhra Pradesh, India. Located on the Chandravanka river, a tributary of the River Krishna joining on its right bank, the waterfall is formed by the confluence of three streams: Chandravanka Vagu, Nakkala Vagu, and Tummala Vagu. It is situated about 11 kilometres (6.8 mi) from Nagarjuna Sagar Dam. The river joins the Krishna river after travelling approximately 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from the falls.

topPlaces.name: Macherla
topPlaces.description: Macherla is a town in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Macherla mandal in Gurazala revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kambhampadu, Pedakurapadu mandal
topPlaces.description: Kambhampadu is a village in the Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh in Macherla mandal of Guntur revenue division.

items.note: Macherla is a town in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the headquarters of Macherla mandal in Gurazala revenue division.
Kambhampadu is a village in the Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh in Macherla mandal of Guntur revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ethipothala Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ethipothala Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ethipothala Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (130 km) and the nearest railway station is Guntur Junction (113 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ethipothala Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ethipothala Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ethipothala Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Ethipothala Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ethipothala Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Macherla, Kambhampadu, Pedakurapadu mandal.
